title: populus nigra subsp. italica
intro: Populus nigra subsp. italica, commonly known as Black Poplar or Italian Poplar, is a subspecies of the black poplar tree native to Europe and North Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, derived from its bark and sap. The health benefits of Populus nigra subsp. italica include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as supporting cardiovascular health and lowering blood pressure. The plant is often prepared as a salve, infusion, or tincture, and is used in traditional herbal medicine to treat a range of conditions, from skin irritations and respiratory issues to digestive problems and menstrual cramps.
